<div class="new-home-sep-24">

<div class="home-hero-background-video w-background-video w-background-video-atom" poster-url="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8%2F68d11caf9cba7a307e08800e_min-com-hero-bg-2-compressed-poster-00001.jpg" video-urls="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8%2F68d11caf9cba7a307e08800e_min-com-hero-bg-2-compressed-transcode.mp4,https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8%2F68d11caf9cba7a307e08800e_min-com-hero-bg-2-compressed-transcode.webm" data-autoplay="true" data-loop="true" wf-ignore="true">

<div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container z-index w-container">

<div class="w-layout-grid home-hero-main-grid">

<div class="hero-section-content-wrapper">

# Exascale AI Data Store

<div class="_40px-h-div">

</div>

<div class="paragraph-medium _65">

MinIO AIStor delivers unmatched enterprise performance, scale, agility and economics for AI data, agentic computing, and analytics.

</div>

<div class="_40px-h-div">

</div>

<div class="training-buttons-wrapper wrap">

<a href="/download" class="button w-inline-block" data-wf-native-id-path="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ff2a" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ff2a"></a>

<div>

Download

</div>

## 2026 Databricks ISV Storage Partner of the Year

<div class="_24px-h-div">

</div>

<div>

MinIO is recognized by Databricks for transforming how enterprises run AI and analytics on data in place through zero-copy hybrid data architectures.

</div>

<div class="_24px-h-div">

</div>

</div>

<div class="paragraph-large semi-bold red">

Exascale AI Runs on MinIO

</div>

<div class="_16px-h-div">

</div>

## Trusted by the World's Most Demanding Data-Driven Organizations

</div>

<div class="section section _40px-top-padding">

<div class="w-layout-blockcontainer new-container w-container">

<div class="w-layout-grid _2-card-grid-1">

<div class="gray-bg-wrapper">

<div class="w-layout-grid promo-band-grid _600">

<div>

<div class="text-md">

IN THE NEWS

</div>

<div class="_10px-h-div">

</div>

### **MinIO AIStor & MemKV Deliver the Secure AI Data Path with NVIDIA Vera BlueField-4 STX** 

<div class="_10px-h-div">

</div>

<div class="_560px-div auto">

<div class="text-lg">

The only object storage and context memory solution purpose-built across the complete AI data pipeline, from persistent S3 storage to in-context GPU memory.

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div>

<a href="https://www.min.io/press/minio-aistor-and-memkv-deliver-the-secure-ai-data-path-for-nvidia-bluefield-4-stx" class="button black w-inline-block" data-wf-native-id-path="c85b3463-d064-546b-d340-54fa5e6c5f9d" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="c85b3463-d064-546b-d340-54fa5e6c5f9d"></a>

<div>

Read the Announcement

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="gray-bg-wrapper">

<div class="w-layout-grid promo-band-grid _600">

<div class="div-block-146">

<img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8/69b732a533e9bca539ebe783_quote.svg" class="testimonila-icon" loading="lazy" width="30" />

<div class="w-richtext">

#### MinIO AIStor, NVIDIA DOCA Vault, and NVIDIA Vera BlueField-4 STX together establish a secure data fabric for agentic AI factories, enabling enterprises and sovereign clouds to safeguard critical data while scaling trusted AI with performance and efficiency.

‍

###### **— Jason Hardy**

<sup>Vice President, Storage Technologies, NVIDIA</sup>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="section section gray">

<div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container w-container">

<div class="section-header _64px-margin">

<div class="_800px-div">

## The MinIO AIStor Advantage

<div class="_24px-h-div">

</div>

<div class="paragraph-medium _65">

AIStor delivers cloud-native object storage that scales infinitely, simplifies operations, and accelerates AI and analytics workloads without compromise.

</div>

</div>

<div class="_24px-h-div">

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-layout__wrap" tabs-autoplay-duration="5000" tabs="wrapper" tabs-autoplay="true">

<div class="tab-layout__col _2">

<div class="tab-content__wrap">

<div class="tab-content__inner">

<div class="tab-content__bottom" role="tablist">

<a href="#" class="tab-content__item active w-inline-block" role="tab" data-tabs="content-item" data-wf-native-id-path="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ffad" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ffad"></a>

<div class="tab-content__item-main">

<div class="auto-tab-div-wraper">

##### Limitless Scalability

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-content__item-detail" tabs="item-details">

<div class="tab-description__spacer">

</div>

<div class="tab-description">

AIStor eliminates the 20-30 petabyte walls that plague traditional storage systems. Our distributed architecture scales seamlessly across clusters, data centers, and clouds—supporting exabyte-scale deployments with a single namespace.

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-content__item-bottom">

<div class="tab-progress" tabs="item-progress">

</div>

</div>

<a href="#" class="tab-content__item w-inline-block" role="tab" data-tabs="content-item" data-wf-native-id-path="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ffb8" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ffb8"></a>

<div class="tab-content__item-main">

<div class="auto-tab-div-wraper">

##### Unmatched Performance

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-content__item-detail" tabs="item-details">

<div class="tab-description__spacer">

</div>

<div class="tab-description">

Built from the ground up as high-performance object storage, AIStor delivers native S3 compatibility with consistent sub-10ms latency. No legacy bottlenecks, no gateway overhead—just pure, scalable performance designed for modern workloads.

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-content__item-bottom">

<div class="tab-progress" tabs="item-progress">

</div>

</div>

<a href="#" class="tab-content__item w-inline-block" role="tab" data-tabs="content-item" data-wf-native-id-path="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ffc3" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ffc3"></a>

<div class="tab-content__item-main">

<div class="auto-tab-div-wraper">

##### Zero-Touch Operations

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-content__item-detail" tabs="item-details">

<div class="tab-description__spacer">

</div>

<div class="tab-description">

AIStor’s self-healing, self-managing architecture eliminates the operational complexity that drains your team's resources. Automated data protection, intelligent load balancing, and simplified management let you focus on innovation, not infrastructure firefighting.

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-content__item-bottom">

<div class="tab-progress" tabs="item-progress">

</div>

</div>

<a href="#" class="tab-content__item w-inline-block" role="tab" data-tabs="content-item" data-wf-native-id-path="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ffce" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ffce"></a>

<div class="tab-content__item-main">

<div class="auto-tab-div-wraper">

##### Maximum GPU Utilization

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-content__item-detail" tabs="item-details">

<div class="tab-description__spacer">

</div>

<div class="tab-description">

MinIO's streamlined architecture eliminates metadata bloat and POSIX overhead that starve your GPUs. Deliver maximum throughput to your AI training and inference workloads, ensuring every dollar of your infrastructure investment delivers results.

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-content__item-bottom">

<div class="tab-progress" tabs="item-progress">

</div>

</div>

<a href="#" class="tab-content__item w-inline-block" role="tab" data-tabs="content-item" data-wf-native-id-path="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ffd9" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e3ffd9"></a>

<div class="tab-content__item-main">

<div class="auto-tab-div-wraper">

##### Enterprise-Grade Reliability

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-content__item-detail" tabs="item-details">

<div class="tab-description__spacer">

</div>

<div class="tab-description">

Built for mission-critical workloads with 99.999999999% (11 9's) data durability, comprehensive security controls, and global replication. MinIO powers the world's largest AI initiatives with confidence.

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-content__item-bottom">

<div class="tab-progress" tabs="item-progress">

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="tab-layout__col">

<div class="tab-visual__wrap" aria-live="polite" role="region">

<div id="tab1" class="tab-visual__item active" tabs="visual-item" role="tabpanel">

<div class="tab-visual__inner">

<img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8/68fa0c953d17bfd7a2833f6e_68d2bb7261532a66734ea709_aistor-scalability.avif" class="tab-image" loading="lazy" width="600" alt="Three converging rows of icons representing servers, network nodes, and cloud storage under the AI&#39;STOR logo." />

</div>

</div>

<div id="tab6" class="tab-visual__item" tabs="visual-item" role="tabpanel">

<div class="tab-visual__inner">

<img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8/68d2bb614684b2dd09007a8a_aistor-performance.avif" class="tab-image" sizes="(max-width: 767px) 100vw, 573px" loading="lazy" srcset="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8/68d2bb614684b2dd09007a8a_aistor-performance-p-500.png 500w, https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8/68d2bb614684b2dd09007a8a_aistor-performance.avif 1201w" width="572" alt="AI&#39;STOR logo above three server icons connected to a central icon with a rocket, linked to a label reading &#39;S3 compatibility&#39; and three filter icons below." />

</div>

</div>

<div id="tab3" class="tab-visual__item" tabs="visual-item" role="tabpanel">

<div class="tab-visual__inner">

<div class="_850px-div">

## AI Leaders Run on AIStor

<div class="_24px-h-div">

</div>

<div class="paragraph-medium _65">

Unify and future-proof your enterprise AI data infrastructure with AIStor’s object-native, software-defined architecture. Build for the exascale era.

</div>

</div>

<div class="_20px-h-div">

19.2 TiB/s

</div>

<div class="_20px-h-div">

</div>

<div class="paragraph-medium _65">

Saturates any hardware, from drive IOPS to network throughput. Delivers unprecedented throughput at exabyte scale with zero bottlenecks.

</div>

<div class="w-layout-blockcontainer container w-container">

<div class="section-header">

<div class="section-subtitle-wrapper">

###### Our solution

</div>

<div class="_850px-div">

## Build AI-Powered Applications Without Limits

<div class="_24px-h-div">

</div>

<div class="paragraph-medium _65">

From massive models to exabyte-scale training and inference data, AIStor delivers the performance, consistency, and freedom to grow with your ambitions.

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-layout-grid our-solution-home-grid">

<a href="/use-cases/ai-training" class="video-card w-inline-block" data-wf-native-id-path="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e40080" data-wf-ao-click-engagement-tracking="true" data-wf-element-id="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e40080"><img src="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8/68cc5a520178f90a23c85680_Card%20(1).png" class="card-bg-img" loading="lazy" data-w-id="d2cf196d-4177-2c94-5fb6-dd9db4e40081" sizes="100vw" srcset="https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8/68cc5a520178f90a23c85680_Card%20(1)-p-500.png 500w, https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8/68cc5a520178f90a23c85680_Card%20(1)-p-800.png 800w, https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/681c8426519d8db8f867c1e8/68cc5a520178f90a23c85680_Card%20(1).png 1169w" alt="Close-up of an abstract molecular structure with purple spheres connected by thin rods on an orange and pink background." /></a>

<div class="video-card-top-content">

<div class="_12px-h-div">

</div>

### AI Training

<div class="_20px-h-div">

</div>

<div class="paragraph-medium white-88">

AIStor delivers high-performance, S3-compatible object storage purpose-built for AI training at scale.

</div>

</div>

### Financial Transactions

<div class="_20px-h-div">

</div>

<div class="paragraph-medium _65">

AIStor consolidates scattered transaction data into a single, high-performance platform—eliminating silos, redundant copies, and integration complexity.

</div>

</div>

<div class="_20px-h-div">

</div>
